title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
